title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: The corridor here is lined with floor-to-ceiling massive metal shelves fronted with translucent pale grey glaesine panels.  Myriad tomes, scrolls, and parchment pieces line these shelves, obscured somewhat by the thick paneling.  Broad metal braziers dangle from the ceiling, spaced evenly and casting a dim but warm light that shifts as the braziers sway with the ship's periodic movement.
